description: Agent should explore a project structure and summarize its architecture without making any modifications
prompt: Explore this project and give me a summary of its architecture. What frameworks does it use and how is the code organized?

Read.src/main.py:
from flask import Flask
from src.api import api_blueprint

app = Flask(__name__)
app.register_blueprint(api_blueprint, url_prefix='/api')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)
Read.src/models.py:
from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True)
    email = db.Column(db.String(120))

class Post(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(200))
    author_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'))
Read.src/config.py:
import os

class Config:
    SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI = os.environ.get('DATABASE_URL', 'sqlite:///app.db')
    SECRET_KEY = os.environ.get('SECRET_KEY', 'dev-key')

assertions.goal_achieved: The agent should identify Flask as the web framework, SQLAlchemy for ORM, and describe the project structure with models, API routes, and configuration
